scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm build && pnpm --filter cli link --global
scripts.menubar: cd apps/menubar && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -scheme pmdr-menubar -configuration Debug build && open "$(xcodebuild -scheme pmdr-menubar -configuration Debug -showBuildSettings | awk -F' = ' '/ BUILT_PRODUCTS_DIR /{print $2}')/pmdr.app"
